creator: antoine@FreeBSD.org
text:
New failures logs on 12.3 i386:

http://pb2.nyi.freebsd.org/data/123i386-default-foo/2022-08-30_07h32m52s/logs/errors/amd64-binutils-2.39,1.log
http://pb2.nyi.freebsd.org/data/123i386-default-foo/2022-08-30_07h32m52s/logs/errors/elf-dissector-0.0.1_1.log
http://pb2.nyi.freebsd.org/data/123i386-default-foo/2022-08-30_07h32m52s/logs/errors/libxine-1.2.12_2.log
http://pb2.nyi.freebsd.org/data/123i386-default-foo/2022-08-30_07h32m52s/logs/errors/atf-rk3328-v2.6.log
http://pb2.nyi.freebsd.org/data/123i386-default-foo/2022-08-30_07h32m52s/logs/errors/atf-rk3399-v2.6.log
http://pb2.nyi.freebsd.org/data/123i386-default-foo/2022-08-30_07h32m52s/logs/errors/atf-sun50i_a64-v2.6.log
http://pb2.nyi.freebsd.org/data/123i386-default-foo/2022-08-30_07h32m52s/logs/errors/atf-sun50i_h6-v2.6.log

Around 20 ports were skipped due to those new failures
